zh.lifeSummary: 當Floris van Bronckhorst於大約1222年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德斯廷德倫布洛霍斯特時，他的父親Gijsbert II van Bronchorst - Rekheim40歲，母親Kunigonde von Oldenburg36歲。他與Ermengarde von Anholt在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 波肯安霍爾特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1290年在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德布洛可斯特布洛霍斯特享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Floris van Bronckhorst于大约1222年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德斯廷德倫布洛霍斯特时，他的父亲Gijsbert II van Bronchorst - Rekheim40岁，母亲Kunigonde von Oldenburg36岁。他与Ermengarde von Anholt在德国海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 波肯安霍爾特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1290年在荷兰蓋爾德藍德布洛可斯特布洛霍斯特享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Bronckhorst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: habitational name from a small town called Bronkhorst by the river Ijssel near Steenderen in Gelderland province. The placename derives from bronk see Bronk + horst ‘higher located brushwood’.

variants.name: Brunkhorst
meanings: North German: habitational name from a place called Brunkhorst, a cognate of the Dutch name   Bronkhorst  .

variants.name: Bronk
meanings: Dutch: nickname for someone known for sulking or flaunting behavior, from bronken (brunken, perhaps also pronken) ‘to sulk, to strut, to flaunt’.
Dutch: from the personal name Bronne, a variant of Bruno + the diminutive suffix -ke.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from the village of Bronki, in eastern Poland.

nameMeanings.name: Floris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a personal name derived from Latin flos, genitive floris ‘flower’.
Greek: derivative of Floros , or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name, such as Florakis.

variants.name: Flore
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of flowers and the spring (a derivative of Latin flos ‘flower’, genitive floris). It is also the feminine form of the old Roman family name Florus, likewise derived from flos. Flora was little used in England before the 18th century, when it was imported from Scotland. In 1746 Flora Macdonald ( 1722–90 ) of Milton in South Uist helped Bonnie Prince Charlie to escape from there to the Island of Skye, disguised as a woman, after his defeat at Culloden. In fact, Flora was merely an Anglicized form of her Gaelic name, Fionnaghal, a variant of Fionnguala ( see Fionnuala ). However, her fame made the name Flora popular in the Highlands and elsewhere.

en.lifeSummary: When Floris van Bronckhorst was born about 1222, in Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Gijsbert II van Bronchorst - Rekheim, was 40 and his mother, Kunigonde von Oldenburg, was 36. He married Ermengarde von Anholt in Anholt, Borken District, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1290, in Bronkhorst, Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Floris van Bronckhorst est né environ 1222, à Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Gijsbert II van Bronchorst - Rekheim, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Kunigonde von Oldenburg, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde von Anholt à Anholt, Kreis Borken, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1290, à Bronkhorst, Bronckhorst, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.Anholt, Westfalen, Prussia: Anholt, Kreis Borken, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Floris van Bronckhorst um 1222 in Bronkhorst, Steenderen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gijsbert II van Bronchorst - Rekheim 40 und seine Mutter Kunigonde von Oldenburg 36. Er hat in Anholt, Kreis Borken, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland Ermengarde von Anholt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1290 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Bronkhorst, Bronckhorst, Geldern, Niederlande.

ko.Anholt, Westfalen, Prussia: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 볼켄 아홀트
ko.lifeSummary: Floris van Bronckhorst(이)가 대략 1222년 네덜란드 글델랜드 스티더 브론k호르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gijsbert II van Bronchorst - Rekheim(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigonde von Oldenburg(은)는 36세였다. 그는 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 볼켄 아홀트에서 Ermengarde von Anholt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 네덜란드 글델랜드 브론크호르스트 브론k호르스트에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Anholt, Westfalen, Prussia: анолт, крис боркен, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Floris van Bronckhorst родился около 1222 г. в местности бронхаурст, стиндирен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Gijsbert II van Bronchorst - Rekheim было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigonde von Oldenburg, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde von Anholt в местности анолт, крис боркен, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1290 г. в местности бронхаурст, бронккхаурст, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 69 лет.

Se casó con Ermengarde von Anholt en Anholt, Kreis Borken, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1290, en Bronkhorst, Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 69 años.
